name: @real-router/shared-sources
description: Shared source modules (browser-env, dom-utils, ssr) — symlinked into consumer packages. Inert workspace entry (no scripts): exists only so pnpm materializes shared/node_modules for transitive @real-router/* (core, sources) resolution during consumer bundling. Type-check / lint / tests + 100% coverage are owned by the consumers via the symlinks.
